meaning: n.文氏管,文丘里管(一种流体流量测定装置 亦作venturitube)
examples: The American-born architect Robert Venturi concluded that if simplicity is done badly, the result is soulless design.
Manipulator with adjustable suction cups tooling (Venturi) for gripping and handling tanks.
One of the first cars to use Michelin's four-wheel-drive ActiveWheel set-up is likely to be the Venturi Volage.
Intersection x Venturi Antarctica x Pom Klementieff from Remi Ferrante on Vimeo.
Robert Venturi softened his Vanna Venturi House to accommodate his mother's old-fashioned furniture by simply adding moulding.
